brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Last five minutes. That's the spike. Show me everything.

expected.sql: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE timestamp >= getvariable('ch8_anchor') - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND timestamp <= getvariable('ch8_anchor')

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many. Five minutes only — @timestamp:[now-5m to now].'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. The five-minute spike window should be around two hundred rows.'
Carol: 'Query error. @timestamp:[now-5m to now] — m is minutes, not hours.'
Carol: '@timestamp:[now-5m to now]. The spike is the last five minutes.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Two hundred rows. chrono-portal-mirror is in here. Four logs.
